reasoning: Query asks for cherry blossom spots in Tohoku but get_spots fetched Akita generally. Results include Akita Castle ruins and Lake Tazawa — legitimate spots but zero sakura-specific filtering. No sakura_meisho or hanami-tagged items surfaced in truncated output. Tohoku = multi-prefecture region; single Akita call undercovers it.
missing_data: Other Tohoku prefectures (Iwate/Aomori/Miyagi/Yamagata/Fukushima). Kakunodate samurai district sakura — a sakura_meisho_100 site in Akita — not in truncated output. Hirosaki Castle sakura absent.
improvement_hint: Fan out get_spots across all 6 Tohoku prefectures and filter by kinds containing 'sakura_meisho' or 'hanami' to surface cherry-blossom-specific spots.

reasoning: Query seeks major Niigata sake breweries. Response returns 24 items including the celebrated Koshi no Kanbai, Hakkaisan, Kubota brands with correct brewery/brand context, Wikidata QIDs, descriptions, and MAFF GI item. Highly grounded. English descriptions accurate. Good practical value for sake tourism.
missing_data: Physical brewery visit addresses or visiting hours. Brewery tour availability not indicated. Echigo Beer or other craft breweries not covered.
improvement_hint: Add brewery_visit_available flag and typical tour hours to sake_brewery items so agents can distinguish visitable from purchase-only brands.

reasoning: Query asks for ski resorts with hot springs (onsen) in Hakuba. Top result is Hakuba Happo-One ski resort — correct. But onsen constraint is not filtered for; no onsen/hot spring tagged entries appear in truncated output. UN Tourism village news item and art museum are noise. No onsen ryokan cross-linked.
missing_data: Onsen facilities near Hakuba ski areas (Hakuba Happo-One has onsen facilities, Tsugaike, Cortina). Should cross-reference get_hotels for onsen_ryokan in 白馬村.
improvement_hint: When ski_resort + onsen intent detected, chain get_hotels with onsen_ryokan filter for same municipality to surface the combined ski+onsen offering.

reasoning: Query asks for autumn foliage (紅葉) in Kansai region; tool fetches Kyoto spots generally. First result Nijo Castle has no foliage tag. Nagaoka-kyo archaeological site irrelevant. Kansai = multiple prefectures; only Kyoto fetched. Zero momiji/koyo-specific filtering applied.
missing_data: Osaka (Minoo waterfall), Nara (Yoshino, Kasugayama), Hyogo (Kobe Kitano) autumn foliage. Kyoto-specific foliage spots like Eikan-do, Tofuku-ji not surfaced in truncated output.
improvement_hint: Add region fan-out for Kansai (Kyoto/Osaka/Nara/Hyogo/Shiga/Wakayama) and filter by kinds 'koyo_meisho' or autumn season tags. Nijo Castle returned without foliage relevance signal.

reasoning: Arabic query for famous Kansai cherry blossom spots. Tool fetches Nara spots. Mount Yoshino (吉野山) with sakura_meisho_100 kind leads the results — excellent match. Kofuku-ji and other Nara spots are relevant Kansai destinations. Only Nara fetched; Kansai is multi-prefecture but Yoshino is the iconic sakura site.
missing_data: Osaka (Osaka Castle park), Kyoto (Maruyama, Hirano Shrine), Himeji Castle sakura not represented. Single-prefecture scope reduces coverage.
improvement_hint: For 'Kansai cherry blossom' queries, fan out to Kyoto and Osaka at minimum; Yoshino already covered in Nara but cross-prefectural coverage increases utility.

reasoning: Query asks for stargazing spots on remote Okinawa islands. Tool returns general Okinawa spots: castles (Nakagusuku, Zakimi), Tamaudun mausoleum, Kumejima town. None tagged dark_sky or stargazing. Kumejima is relevant as a remote island but not specifically surfaced for stars. Constraint (離島 + 星空) completely unmet.
missing_data: Iriomote, Ishigaki (Iriomote-Ishigaki National Park designated dark sky), Yonaguni, Kume islands with star-viewing facilities or dark_sky designation tags.
improvement_hint: Add dark_sky and astro_tourism kinds tags to relevant Okinawa islands; add sub-island get_spots queries for 石垣市 and 竹富町 where dark sky parks exist.

reasoning: Thai query for rural Hokkaido onsen accommodation. get_hotels returns 日本秘湯を守る会 members (Chinaito Onsen, Ginkonyu, Tokachidake Onsen, Wakkomusou) — all rural, confirmed, with authentic descriptions. Rural constraint well handled. ANA Holiday Inn Sapporo is urban noise but minor. Good overall.
missing_data: Coordinates missing for hito_yu_kai properties, limiting map usefulness. Website links absent for most. Access route info for remote properties.
improvement_hint: Enrich hito_yu_kai entries with coordinates and official website URLs scraped from hitou.or.jp provider pages to enable navigation for rural onsen seekers.

reasoning: Vietnamese query for Seto Inland Sea islands. Tool fetches Kagawa spots. Ritsurin Garden and Marugame Castle are in Kagawa but not islands — they are on mainland Takamatsu and Marugame. Mannō Lake also mainland. The island constraint is unmet; no Naoshima, Teshima, Shodoshima, or Shiwaku Islands surfaced.
missing_data: Naoshima (art island), Teshima, Shodoshima (olive/angel road), Ogijima — key Seto Inland Sea islands. Should query Kagawa island municipalities specifically.
improvement_hint: Add 'island' kind filter or municipality-level queries for 直島町, 小豆島町 to surface actual Seto Inland Sea islands rather than mainland Kagawa spots.

reasoning: Query asks for indigo dyeing workshops in Tokushima. Tool returns crafts: Awa Hon-ai Shijira Weave (indigo textile craft) is relevant but is a product designation, not a workshop listing. Otani Ware (ceramics) and Awa Washi (paper) are tangential. No workshop venues or experience facilities returned — only METI designations.
missing_data: Workshop/experience venue names, addresses, booking URLs for indigo dyeing experiences in Tokushima. Indigo farmland in Kamikatsu or Aizumi town not referenced.
improvement_hint: Cross-link METI craft designations with municipal scrape data for experience workshops (体験工房) in production areas listed in production_area_text field.

reasoning: German query for Koyasan shukubo (temple lodging). Response delivers confirmed Koyasan Shukubo Association members with temple names, phone numbers, municipality (高野町), rich Japanese descriptions of each temple's character. Excellent specificity, constraint fully met. Coordinates missing but all other details strong.
missing_data: Coordinates for shukubo locations, English name translations, pricing range, and booking URLs. Vegetarian shojin ryori availability mentioned only implicitly.
improvement_hint: Add English name fields and booking URLs (shukubo.net links present in sources) to surface these directly; coordinates would enable map display.

reasoning: Query for samurai districts outside Kyoto. search_area returns 153 matches. Kakunodate (Akita) with rich description and sakura_meisho_100/preservation_district kinds is a standout. Multiple prefectures represented. Matsue buke_yashiki and Fukui Uchiyama family residence also surfaced. 'Off the beaten path' constraint partly met — Kakunodate is well-known but non-Kyoto.
missing_data: Chiran (Kagoshima), Kitsuki (Oita), Hagi (Yamaguchi) samurai districts — classic non-Kyoto options. Addresses and visiting hours for listed properties.
improvement_hint: Boost buke_yashiki + preservation_district combined results; filter out Tokyo results explicitly when 'outside Kyoto' implies non-major-city intent.

reasoning: Indonesian query for summer festivals in Akita. Only 3 items returned, all bunka_intangible designations — Dainichido Bugaku, Kakunodate Festival, Tsuchizaki Shinmei. None are specifically summer festivals; Dainichido Bugaku is held in January. National heritage section includes Hayachine Kagura (Iwate, not Akita). Summer constraint unmet.
missing_data: Akita Kanto Festival (August 3-6), Omagari National Fireworks (late August) — two of Japan's most famous summer festivals. Ningyo-no-sato festival. Scraped event data not surfaced.
wrong_data: Tsuchizaki festival date '1705-01-01' is a data artifact, not a summer festival date. Hayachine Kagura is from Iwate, not Akita.
improvement_hint: Integrate scraped_schema_event data into get_festivals results for Akita with month filter for summer; current tool only returns bunka_intangible which misses mass summer festivals.

reasoning: Korean query for small fishing port towns in San'in region. Tool returns general Shimane spots: Lake Shinji, Matsue Castle, Iwami Ginzan Mine. These are major sightseeing spots, not small fishing towns. The 漁港 (fishing harbor) + 町 (town) constraint completely unmet. No coastal fishing communities surfaced.
missing_data: Mihonoseki fishing port town (天然の良港), Yunotsu (温泉津) port town, Tsuwano (mountain but historic), Hamada fish market area. Tottori coast fishing ports.
improvement_hint: Add fishing_port and coastal_town kind tags to relevant Shimane/Tottori municipalities; scrape official port/fishery pages for 漁港 towns along San'in coast.

reasoning: Query asks where to experience washi paper-making in Gifu. Tool returns 8 crafts with Mino Ware, Hida Shunkei lacquer, and other items. Mino Washi (美濃和紙) is the relevant item but not present in the 8 items shown. The 'experience' (体験) intent is unmet — METI designations are product categories, not workshop venues.
missing_data: 美濃和紙あかりアート館 and washi experience workshops in Mino City.美濃和紙 METI craft designation missing from 8 items shown.
improvement_hint: 美濃和紙 (Mino Washi) should appear in Gifu craft results — verify it's in the dataset. Cross-link production_area_text to municipal scrape venues offering craft experience (体験).

reasoning: Spanish query for fishing villages on Noto Peninsula. Tool fetches Ishikawa spots and returns Kanazawa Castle, Kenroku-en, Oyama Shrine — all in Kanazawa city, not Noto Peninsula. The 能登半島 (Noto Peninsula) geographic constraint is completely missed. Municipality filter for Noto area not applied.
missing_data: Wajima (輪島) lacquer town and morning market, Suzu, Anamizu fishing ports, Sosogi coast, Kiriko festival towns. These are all Noto Peninsula municipalities.
improvement_hint: Noto Peninsula spans municipalities like 輪島市, 珠洲市, 能登町, 穴水町 — query should fan-out to these municipalities or use semantic search for '能登 漁村'. Prefecture-only query returns Kanazawa by default.

reasoning: Query seeks lesser-known sand dunes beyond Tottori. search_area returns 91 matches with sand_dune kind. Tottori appears (expected) but also Fukiagehama (Kagoshima), Ishikari dune museum (Hokkaido), Onjuku Beach (Chiba). 'Not just Tottori' intent reasonably addressed by multi-prefecture spread. Good diversity.
missing_data: Nakatajima (浜松) sand dunes, Sarobetsu (北海道) coastal dunes, Uchidumi (山形) dunes. Some results lack coordinates.
improvement_hint: Deprioritize Tottori results when query explicitly excludes it; surface non-Tottori sand dune entries earlier in ranking to better serve the 'beyond Tottori' constraint.

reasoning: Chinese query for traditional crafts in San'in region. Tool returns 4 Shimane crafts in Chinese: Iwami Ware (ceramics), Sekishu Washi (paper), Unshuu Abacus, and Izumo Stone Lantern. All with high-confidence Chinese translations, METI designations, production area details. Excellent match to intent. Tottori crafts absent (San'in = Shimane+Tottori) but coverage solid.
missing_data: Tottori crafts (因州和紙 Inshu Washi paper, 弓浜絣 Yumihama Kasuri weaving). See_also venues relevant. San'in region = both prefectures.
improvement_hint: For regional queries like 山陰 (San'in), auto fan-out to both Shimane and Tottori prefectures rather than requiring explicit second query.

reasoning: Query asks for lavender fields in Hokkaido beyond Furano. Tool returns general Hokkaido spots: Showa-Shinzan volcano, Sapporo Clock Tower, Matsumae Castle — none are lavender fields. No lavender_field kind tag filtering. Furano/Biei lavender not even surfaced; the constraint 'beyond Furano' implies familiarity with it.
missing_data: Hokkaido lavender fields: Nakafurano Farm Tomita (Furano) — known, 富良野市 Lavender East, Kamifurano, 美瑛 (Biei) flower fields, Sobetsu Sakura area. None surfaced.
improvement_hint: Add lavender_field kind tag to Farm Tomita and Biei flower farm entities; add 'lavender' as intent keyword to route to seasonal botanical content rather than general get_spots.

reasoning: Filipino query translates to 'traditional old towns in Kyushu' (not 'coffee towns'). Tool fetches Oita spots: Usuki Castle, Usa Shrine, Oka Castle, Kuujumachi — historic but not old town districts. Oita is one prefecture; Kyushu has 7. No preservation districts or machiya/historic townscape entries surfaced.
missing_data: Hita (日田) historic merchant town, Yanagawa canal district, Usuki stone Buddhas district, Taketa castle town. Should span Fukuoka/Kumamoto/Saga/Nagasaki for full Kyushu coverage.
improvement_hint: For regional Kyushu queries, fan-out to multiple prefectures; add filter for preservation_district + jokamachi kinds to surface historic townscapes specifically.

reasoning: Query asks for stayable kominka (old farmhouses) in Hokuriku. Tool returns Ishikawa hotels: hito_yu_kai onsen ryokan (not kominka), 'Student housing 1' (noise), AB Hotel (noise). Kominka accommodation constraint entirely unmet. Hokuriku = Ishikawa + Toyama + Fukui + Niigata, but only Ishikawa queried.
missing_data: Kominka guesthouses in Noto Peninsula (pre-earthquake), Shirakawa-go (gassho-zukuri farmhouses), Tsuruga or Echizen machiya. Toyama, Fukui also not queried.
wrong_data: 'Student housing 1' is not a traveler accommodation and should not appear in travel hotel results.
improvement_hint: Add kominka lodging type to hotel data model; filter out non-traveler accommodations (student housing, office buildings) from get_hotels results. Fan-out to Toyama and Fukui for Hokuriku coverage.

reasoning: Query for mountain shrines on Kii Peninsula. get_japan_heritage for Wakayama returns Kongōbu-ji (Koyasan), Kumano Kodō (UNESCO WHS), Kumano Sanzan, Negoro-ji — all directly relevant sacred mountain destinations. Rich descriptions, coordinates, heritage designations. Tool scope note helpfully redirects for Kumano. Very well matched.
missing_data: Nachi Falls shrine (熊野那智大社) individually, Dorogawa Onsen (天河大弁財天社), Yoshino-Mikumari Shrine. Mie prefecture side of Kumano not covered (Ise is separate).
improvement_hint: Surface individual Kumano Sanzan shrines (Hongu Taisha, Nachi Taisha, Hayatama Taisha) as separate entities in addition to the collective Kumano Sanzan entry.

reasoning: Query for summer fireworks along Sea of Japan coast. Tool returns 129 Niigata events. Nagaoka Fireworks Festival (長岡まつり大花火大会) appears as third item — a major Sea of Japan coast fireworks event. But first two items are phlox flower (芝桜) and lily festivals, not fireworks. No fireworks-specific filtering; Sea of Japan coast constraint covers more than just Niigata.
missing_data: Omagari Fireworks (Akita), Kashiwazaki Fireworks, other Sea of Japan coast prefectures (Ishikawa, Fukui, Yamagata) hanabi events not covered.
improvement_hint: Add fireworks/hanabi kind filter to get_festivals; fan-out Sea of Japan coast query to Akita, Niigata, Ishikawa, Fukui prefectures. Nagaoka is present but buried in noise.

reasoning: Query for traditional bamboo crafts in Oita. Response returns 2 METI crafts: Hakata Weave (Oita is in its multi-prefecture area) and Beppu Bamboo Crafts (別府竹細工) — the latter is exactly what was requested with detailed materials, techniques, and production area. Excellent match. See_also venues add context.
missing_data: Beppu Bamboo Crafts experience workshops or museum visitor information. Oita Prefectural Museum of History in see_also is relevant but lacks visiting hours.
improvement_hint: Hakata Ori's Oita inclusion is technically correct (multi-prefecture area) but may confuse users — flag primary production area (Fukuoka) to avoid misattribution.

reasoning: Query for cycling routes through rural Shikoku. Ehime spots returned: Ozu Castle, Yuzuki Castle, Ōmishima Island (cycling_route kind) — Ōmishima is relevant with cycling_route tag. Uwajima Castle also. But Shimanami Kaidō (the iconic Shikoku cycling route crossing Ōmishima) not explicitly surfaced, and only Ehime queried out of 4 Shikoku prefectures.
missing_data: Shimanami Kaidō route explicitly, Kochi Shimanto River cycling, Tokushima cycling routes, rural inland Shikoku (Iya Valley). Only Ehime covered.
improvement_hint: For Shikoku cycling intent, surface cycling_route kind items across all 4 prefectures (Ehime/Kochi/Tokushima/Kagawa); Shimanami Kaidō should be top result with dedicated cycling route entity.

reasoning: Query for kabuki outside Tokyo/Kyoto. get_traditional_arts returns 183 items. Kabuki (UNESCO) appears as second item but as an art form concept, not venue listings. Response continues with Bunraku, Chakkirako, Dainichido Bugaku — these are not kabuki. No regional kabuki venues (Konpira Grand Theatre, Uchiko-za, Misono-za) surfaced. Data present but synthesized wrong.
missing_data: Kotohira Kanamaru-za (oldest kabuki theater, Kagawa), Uchiko-za (Ehime), Misono-za (Nagoya), Minamiza (Kyoto — technically listed but user said 'outside Kyoto'). Venue-level kabuki theater entities absent.
improvement_hint: Add kabuki_theater kind tag to specific theater venues (金丸座, 内子座); filter get_traditional_arts to show kabuki-specific items first when kabuki keyword detected, then cross-link venue spots.
